headline: Freeport-McMoRan Earnings: The Good, the Bad, and the Grasberg
summary: There is one metal quietly sitting at the center of the modern economy. It runs through electric vehicles, powers AI data centers, and connects massive renewable energy projects around the world. That metal is copper, and few companies produce more of it than Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE: FCX.

headline: Can Newmont Keep Riding The Gold Rally Into 2027?
summary: For years, Newmont (NYSE:NEM) was seen as the classic gold mining giant, a company built around scale, production growth, and big mining projects. But in 2026, the story is starting to look very different.

headline: DIAMOND INFRASTRUCTURE SOLUTIONS ANNOUNCES RFQ FOR POWER AND STEAM MODERNIZATION IN FREEPORT, TEXAS
summary: Diamond Infrastructure Solutions today announced a request for quotes (RFQ) as part of an initiative to modernize its power and steam supply at its Freeport, Texas site. Through the RFQ, Diamond has launched a competitive partner engagement process and is actively soliciting proposals from experienced developers and technology providers to advance the company plans to deliver next‑generation facilities and reinforce its long‑term commitment to providing resilient, efficient, and sustainable ener
